_comment: TeeTimer Configuration - Copy this to config.json and fill in your details

booking._comment_time: Target tee time in 24-hour format (07:30 = 7:30 AM)
booking._comment_leeway: How many hours after target_time to keep trying (default 2)
booking._comment_players: Total number of players including yourself
booking._comment_player_names: Names of OTHER players (not you - you're auto-filled as Player 1)
booking._comment_courses: Courses to try, in order of preference

timing._comment_days: How many days in advance tee times open (you said 6)
timing._comment_start: Start trying X minutes before tee times open
timing._comment_first_tee: When first tee time is available (when booking opens)
timing._comment_retry: How often to retry if booking fails
